roa.docketEntryComment: DFNSE EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER SIGNED ORDER
APP/ORD REL EXHBTS-PPL'S EXHBTS REL TO DA INSP,HAGGERTY ON 08022013
SIGNED APP & ORDER FOR DESTRUCTION OF EXHIBITS FILED
DAMAGED EXHIBITS (PPL'S 1 & DFNSE OOOO) DECLARATION FILED
/X:CREDITS ARE MODIFIED AS OF THIS DATE,//X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 1804 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 270 DAYS SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 2074 DAYS,/

/AJW/CH5 SP 9 Y U//DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 1452 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 217 DAYS SAGEFOR A TOTAL OF 1669 DAYS/STATES/DNA/DEF:SHALL PAY A FINE OF $10 PURSUANT TOPC 1202,5/VF5:6600/PAR/DEL:11-25-03/CONTD:DECISION ON REMAINING COUNTS/TEXT/5A/5B/
/CAL:MOTION FOR DISCOVERY RE FINGERPRINT ANALYSIS//X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY DAVID CARRILLO, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/CONTD:MOTIONS/

/X:ATTORNEY ROSENBUSH HAS SUBSTITUTED IN AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD,//X:COUNSEL CONCUR THAT TRIAL CANNOT PROCEED; COURT SETS FORTH DISCUSSION THAT OCCURRED IN CHAMBERS,/X:PRETRIAL AND TRIAL DATES ARE ORDERED VACATED,/MO:TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED/X:TRIAL IS SET FOR DECEMBER 2, 2002,/

/MO:FOR RECONSIDERATION/ARG&SUB//X:COUNSEL STIPULATE THAT DISCOVERY MATERIAL PROVIDED BY PEOPLE WILL BE KEPTCONFIDENTIAL AND NOT SHARED WITH DEFENDANTS,/X:COURT FINDS THERE ARE NEWCIRCUMSTANCES; WILL ALLOW COUNSEL TIME TO REVIEW DISCOVERY MATERIAL,/X:COUNSEL TO FILE ANY ADDITIONAL PLEADINGS NO LATER THAN APRIL 18, 2002 BY4 PM,/
/CAL DECISION ON REMAINING COUNTS//X:COUNTS 1, 2 AND 8 ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO 1385PC,/
/CONTD: STATUS OF DECISION ON REMAINING COUNTS/DOP/
/X:CAUSE ON CALENDAR IN ERROR, THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF DEFENSE EXHIBITS WITNESSES/
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF DEFENSE EXHIBITS WITNESSES/
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF DEFENSE EXHIBITS WITNESSES/
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF DEFENSE EXHIBITS WITNESSES/
/X:COUNSEL STIPULATE TO RELEASE OF RECORDS FOR COPYING,/
/CAL:ORAL MOTION TO VACATE JURY TRIAL DATE/MO GRTD//CONTD:MOTION RE FINGERPRINT ANALYSIS/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:MOTION FOR REDUCTION OF BAIL ON 5-23-02/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 26/TRANS 26:FORTHWITH FOR MOTION TO CONTINUE/
/CAL:PC 995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED//CONTSGTW/CONTD:TO SET/
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE/CONTSGTW/MO GRTD//CONTD:TO SET TRIAL AND HEARING ON 995PC/
/CAL:MOTION DISCLOSE GRAND JURY INFORMATION//X:MOTION IS GRANTED-DENIED IN PART/CONTSGTW/
CNSL APPTS;CGTW;PLEAS NG ENT'D;CONT 10/5/00 10AM D22 TBS
